---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is. For example: "I'm trying to schedule meetings for a crew at Hellas Planitia but there's no way to..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you have a specific implementation idea, describe it here.

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or screenshots that would help clarify the request. If this relates to a published standard (e.g. an IAU ruling, an RFC, a new planetary constant), please link to it.

## Which library or component does this affect?

- [ ] Web app (interplanet.live / demo/)
- [ ] JavaScript library (planet-time.js / js/)
- [ ] Python library (python/)
- [ ] C library (c/)
- [ ] TypeScript port (typescript/)
- [ ] Another language port — specify: ___
- [ ] LTX protocol or SDK
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] Documentation (docs/)
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Other — specify: ___
